economic_notes: Nation holds investments in Pic Mobert Hydro Inc. ($70,977,621), Muskoka Solar LP ($1,797,788), Rosseau Power Limited Partnership ($847,556), and various other limited partnerships. White Lake Limited Partnership (99.99% owned, GBE) earned net income of $1,984,726. BMI-Maamwigaaboo Contracting (2017) LP (50% owned, GBP) incurred net loss. Gitchi Animki Energy LP and Giizis Power LP also consolidated. Forestry services through Maygwayyawk Forestry Services Corp.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED due to inability to obtain sufficient audit evidence for a controlled entity accounted for under the modified equity method (investments in government business partnership and enterprise). Financial statements are for fiscal year ended March 31, 2022 but were signed February 20, 2024 - a nearly 2-year delay. Large liabilities include Due to Regional Power Inc. ($89,328,521) and Due to Rosseau Power Limited Partnership ($803,829), which appear to relate to power project financing. Portfolio investments include $70,977,621 in Pic Mobert Hydro Inc. Total government transfers estimated by summing ISC, MCCSS, Ministry of Health, CMHC, Ministry of Indigenous Affairs, Ministry of Transportation, Ministry of Education, Kinomaadswin Education Body, Union of Ontario Indians, Anishinabek Employment and Training Services, and Dilico Ojibway Child and Family Services. Capital Programs expenses of $1,610,048 not mapped to infrastructure or housing separately.
